dict.string: echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"TT\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"TT\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickall\" with argument \"\""

🟨 External Trigger
🟧 Call External Trigger
🟥 Run WF Specific Script - Go Back - Rerun Change Attributes Loop - Carry Var to 2nd Run (Change Attributes and Go Back Loops)
⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯
🔵 Search Group
🩵 Smart Lists (View Group)
🟣 Filters Group
🟢 Modifier Key Actions
🩷 Change Attributes Modifier Group
Search Lists, Sections, Tasks, Subtasks, Subsubtasks...

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"1Drill\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""

KEY=$(echo "$1" | sed 's/^cal//' | sed 's/^_//')
osascript \ -e 'tell application "TickTick" to activate' \ -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "TickTick" to click menu item "Open \"Calendar\"" of menu "List" of menu bar 1'
if [ -n "$KEY" ]; then case "$KEY" in 1) KC=18 ;; w) KC=13 ;; m) KC=46 ;; y) KC=16 ;; esac sleep 0.8 osascript \ -e 'tell application "System Events"' \ -e ' key up {command, option, control, shift}' \ -e ' delay 0.4' \ -e " key code $KC" \ -e 'end tell' fi
Choose a folder to filter lists

echo "$folder_id:$list_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"goLists\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""

[{"title":"Today","arg":"1-","subtitle":"Open ⌥ Browse ⌘⇧ Back"},{"title":"Tomorrow","arg":"2-","subtitle":"Open ⌥ Browse ⌘⇧ Back"},{"title":"Next 7 Days","arg":"3-","subtitle":"Open ⌥ Browse ⌘⇧ Back"},{"title":"All","arg":"4-","subtitle":"Open ⌥ Browse ⌘⇧ Back"},{"title":"Completed","arg":"5-","subtitle":"Open ⌥ Browse ⌘⇧ Back"},{"title":"Inbox","arg":"6-","subtitle":"Open ⌥ Browse ⌘⇧ Back"},{"title":"Habits","arg":"7-","subtitle":"Open"},{"title":"Matrix","arg":"8-","subtitle":"Open"},{"title":"Pomodoro","arg":"9-","subtitle":"Open"}]
Browse and action items Folders down approach

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"goSections\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""
Browse Next 7 Days tasks in Alfred
What do you want to do?

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"goTasks\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""
Browse and action today view in Alfred

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"goSubtasks\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""
Browse and action Inbox in Alfred

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"Attributes\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"Attributes\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""
To change another attribute for selected task, press ⏎, if done press ⎋

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"attributeTags\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""
Add a new task to TickTick

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"Attributes\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""

echo "$task_list_id:$task_id" > /tmp/ticktick_reattribute.txt sleep 0.3 osascript -e "tell application id \"com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred\" to run trigger \"Attributes\" in workflow \"com.vex.tickal\" with argument \"\""
Add a task, subtask, list, note...
Add a new task to TickTick

[{"title":"Sync","arg":"1-","subtitle":"Refresh workflow cache via API | ⇧⌘ Back"},{"title":"Tags","arg":"2-","subtitle":"Set Tags | ⇧⌘ Back"},{"title":"Filters","arg":"3-","subtitle":"Set Filters | ⇧⌘ Back"},{"title":"Folders","arg":"4-","subtitle":"Set Folders | ⇧⌘ Back"},{"title":"Login","arg":"5-","subtitle":"OAUTH - Get a token | ⌘⇧ Back"},{"title":"Refresh TickTick","arg":"6-","subtitle":"Refresh TickTick | ⌘⇧ Back"},{"title":"Open TickAL Docs","arg":"7-","subtitle":"GitHub · TickAL | ⌘⇧ Back"}]
Login, Sync, Set: Tags · Filters · Folders, Refresh

> Workflow was initially designed to be ran from a single hotkey. Every item is placed intentionally and modifier keys are planned for optimised execution. In my opinion it is the smoothest experience. Keywords are to make onboarding possibly "clearer" and for choice. Hotkey recommended.
‼️ *Set your main hotkey inside workflow.* ‼️ *Don't forget to run keyword ***"tlogin"*** or hotkey>update>login after pasting you credentials into workflow configuration.*
# Connecting account
> This workflow connects to your TickTick account via the official API. To set it up, you need to register a free developer app and run OAUTH — this takes 2 minutes.
1. Go to developer.ticktick.com/manage and sign in 2. Click Create App, give it any name, set redirect URI to http://localhost:8080 3. Paste client_id and client_secret into the fields 4. Run the workflow using hotkey and select: Update → Login OR use keyword ***"tlogin"*** 5. A browser window opens — log in to TickTick and approve access 6. Done. Your token is saved automatically 7. Run: Update → Sync to prime the cache OR use a keyword ***"tsync"***
---
**Some features require one-time manual setup due to TickTick API limitations.**
- **Tags**: *the API does not return your tags, add them manually* - Set them on the left. - Can also be done by running: *Update → Set Tags* OR keyword ***"tup"*** - **Folders**: *the API does not return folder names, match and name each folder from the list shown* - Set them on the left. -❗️You will still need to run *Update → Set Folders* OR keyword ***"tup"*** to match folder with it's content - **Filters**: the API does not return your filters, add them manually - Run *Update → Set Filters* OR keyword ***"tup"*** - To complicated to be done in workflow config
The rest of the workflow after initialising with set keystroke should be easy to follow.
For detailed instructions, visit [Github · TickAL](https://github.com/vex-glitch/TickAL-TickTick-Alfred-Workflow)
Triggers OAUTH authentication to get a token *Required for workflow to work. Should be first action executed
Starting point of workflow, display all actions in logical way. Best way to use the workflow
Delete prefilled example and fill you own. Must be exactly the same as in TickTick.
Delete example and write down your folders. To preserve hierarchy, use 1) <foldername>. *You will still need to run "tup">set folders to match folder with it's content.
Search everything. Prefix L for lists, N for notes, T for tasks... Execute actions on selected items
Browse your directory inside Alfred folders down. *Requires setting folders - keyword "tup"
Browse, open, action your filters. *Requires setting filters - keyword "tup"
Add tasks, lists, subtasks... Assign date, time, tags, priority, lists, parent task...
Contains all actions required to set up and keep workflow up to date
Refreshes cache using TickTick API. *If workflow feels stale or experiencing issues, run this
